svg.title: Broadcast message flow
svg.desc: Step-by-step flowchart showing how an admin broadcast travels from the admin panel through the server to all connected Socket.IO clients

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Where is the broadcast input in the admin panel?')
sendPrompt('How does requireAdmin check the token?')
sendPrompt('What does io.emit system:broadcast do in Socket.IO?')
g.text: broadcasts to ALL connected sockets — no room filter

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the chat frontend handle the system:broadcast event?')
sendPrompt('How is the broadcast rendered in the chat UI?')

svg.text: also logged in admin broadcast history panel
